name: Cached Domain Credentials Extraction
description: Detects extraction of cached domain credentials from the registry
query:
// Detect cached domain credential dumping
// Trigger on access to cached logon information
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(cachedump|mscash|DCC2|lsadump::cache|Invoke-CachedCredentials|reg.*query.*Cache)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
